tasks.title: Inventory all documentation files in docs directory
tasks.description: Scan the entire docs directory and subdirectories to list all documentation files with their paths, sizes, and last modified dates. Generate a comprehensive inventory report in JSON format listing each doc file and basic metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: Complete list of all documentation files with metadata is generated
Inventory report is saved as docs/documentation-inventory.json
tasks.expectedResult: A JSON file listing all documentation files with metadata exists at docs/documentation-inventory.json

outputPlan.description: Inventory report of all documentation files with metadata

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a complete list of documentation files to analyze for cleanup

tasks.title: Analyze documentation content for redundancy and relevance
tasks.description: Review the content of all documentation files listed in docs/documentation-inventory.json to identify duplicates, overlapping topics, outdated content, and relevance to current project goals. Produce a detailed analysis report recommending which docs to keep, merge, or delete.
acceptanceCriteria: Analysis report covers all documentation files
Clear recommendations for each file: keep, merge (with target), or delete
tasks.expectedResult: A markdown report with detailed analysis and cleanup recommendations exists at docs/documentation-cleanup-report.md

outputPlan.description: Analysis report with recommendations for documentation cleanup

metadata.inputContext: Needs docs/documentation-inventory.json listing all doc files
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides actionable recommendations for documentation cleanup

tasks.title: Review and approve documentation cleanup recommendations
tasks.description: Manually review the documentation-cleanup-report.md to verify the recommendations for removing, merging, or keeping documentation files. Approve or request modifications to the cleanup plan.
acceptanceCriteria: Cleanup plan is reviewed and approved by project stakeholders
Approval or feedback recorded in docs/documentation-cleanup-approval.md
tasks.expectedResult: An approval document exists confirming the cleanup plan or detailing requested changes

outputPlan.description: Approval or feedback document for documentation cleanup plan

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures cleanup plan is validated before execution

tasks.title: Delete documentation files marked for removal
tasks.description: Delete all documentation files explicitly marked for deletion in the approved documentation-cleanup-report.md. Ensure files are removed from the docs directory and git index.
acceptanceCriteria: All files marked for deletion are removed from the filesystem
Git index is updated to reflect deletions
tasks.expectedResult: All unwanted documentation files are deleted and staged for commit

metadata.inputContext: Needs approved cleanup report with files marked for deletion
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Removes clutter and outdated documentation from the project

tasks.title: Merge documentation files marked for consolidation
tasks.description: For each group of documentation files marked to be merged in the approved cleanup report, create a consolidated markdown file combining their content logically. Remove the original files after successful merge. Update any internal links or references accordingly.
acceptanceCriteria: Merged documentation files exist with combined content
Original files marked for merge are removed
Internal references updated to point to merged files
tasks.expectedResult: Consolidated documentation files replace multiple smaller docs as per plan

outputPlan.description: Consolidated documentation files with combined content
Removed original documentation files after merge

metadata.inputContext: Needs approved cleanup report with merge instructions and original files
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Reduces documentation fragmentation and improves maintainability

tasks.title: Update documentation index and navigation to reflect cleanup
tasks.description: Modify any documentation index files, sidebars, or navigation configuration to remove references to deleted docs and add references to merged or new consolidated docs. Ensure navigation is consistent and no broken links exist.
acceptanceCriteria: Documentation index and navigation files updated accordingly
No broken links to removed or merged docs
tasks.expectedResult: Documentation navigation is accurate and up to date after cleanup

outputPlan.description: Updated sidebar navigation reflecting current docs

metadata.inputContext: Needs knowledge of deleted and merged documentation files
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures documentation navigation matches the cleaned documentation set

tasks.title: Run documentation link validation and spell check
tasks.description: Execute automated link validation and spell checking tools on the entire docs directory to ensure no broken links or spelling errors remain after cleanup and merging. Generate a report of issues found.
acceptanceCriteria: No broken links detected in documentation
tasks.expectedResult: Documentation validation report exists with no critical errors

outputPlan.description: Report of link validation and spell check results

metadata.inputContext: Needs updated documentation files after cleanup
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures documentation quality and correctness after cleanup
